method: Evaluated Objectively on multi-tenant OU dataset generated by Contract Schema

budget_analysis.iforest: O(N log N) - Requires batch training - Approx $150/mo (PASS)
budget_analysis.oc_svm: O(N^2) - Too slow for 1000s of tenants - Approx $400/mo (FAIL)
budget_analysis.lof: O(N^2) - Nearest neighbor search too slow - Approx $500/mo (FAIL)
budget_analysis.llm: O(1) per call but token cost is ~$0.01/call. For 1000s of streams/min = $10,000+/mo (FAIL)

conclusion: Objective Winner: ewma_stl. LLM is perfect but fails budget. ML models fail FP rate on OU noise. EWMA meets all constraints.
